title: unsorted CLI flags
body:
# **kind bug**

**Description**

The CLI flags of some commands and sub-commands are not sorted. This complicates looking up and reading the help messages.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
`podman build -h` and others...

comments.body: Qi Wang is looking for some first time PR's, I've asked her to grab this.
I assigned it to @QiWang19, she should be all set now.
